---

This action plan will ensure you are crystal clear on the action steps to get your desired results.
It is designed to supplement the 10X YouTube Manual (10xdownload.com/yt1) and it ties
together all the resources provided in the 10X Youtube System. Make it happen!
RESEARCH AND GET PREPARED	STEP
1
It is essential that you get clear on what you are trying to achieve and how you
plan to do it. While your strategy may change, it is hard to get traction without a
plan. The manual provides details on the various steps to prepare including:
• Youtube and Channel Intro Tutorial (10xresource.com/yt1)
Recommended Resource:
Launch Your Channel, Reach 100 Quality
Subscribers and Start to Driving Traffic!
YOUR GOAL
YOUTUBE ACTION PLAN
What audience you want to serve
Create persona(s) for your ideal viewer
Choose a short slogan for your channel
Identify your primary keyword phrases
Decide on a regular posting schedule
Research industry competitor channels
Subscribe to all relevant channels
Schedule time to create regular videos
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 5 --

START CREATING REGULAR VIDEOS	STEP
3
Once your channel is live, you will want to immediately start adding regular
videos. The frequency is up to you, but the important part is to be consistent.
In addition to standard videos, you can also create “shorts” or live video.
IMPORTANT: Remember that creating the content is half the battle. Always
ensure the you’ve optimized your videos to maximize your views.
• Studio and Analytics Tour (10xresource.com/yt2)
• Channel Setup Checklist (10xdownload.com/yt5)
Recommended Resources:
• Upload and Optimization Tutorial (10xresource.com/yt3)
• Video Brainstorm Mindmap (10xdownload.com/yt3)
• Video Creation Checklist (10xdownload.com/yt6)
• Video Optimization Checklist (10xdownload.com/yt7)
• Grant’s Youtube Swipe File (10xdownload.com/yt8)
• Youtube Video Planner (10xdownload.com/yt2)
Recommended Resources:
CREATE ACCOUNT AND SET UP CHANNEL	STEP
2
Your channel is the central hub for all your Youtube videos and social activity.
When people click on your username or profile picture, they land on your
channel page. There are a number of customizations and settings to configure.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 5 --

START PROMOTING YOUR CHANNEL	STEP
4
After you’ve added at least one video, and ideally added a channel “trailer”
video, you should begin inviting people to view your content and subscribe to
your channel. It is important to let people know why your channel will be of
value to them.
ACTIVELY ENGAGE WITH VIEWERS	STEP
5
As you continue to post videos, it is essential that you engage with your viewers in
any way that you can. The easiest way to do this is in comments. Be sure to reply to
every comment and give a heart whenever it makes sense. Also make an effort to
follow other channels within your same niche and engage with their viewers.
• Youtube Growth Strategy (10xdownload.com/yt4)
Recommended Resource:
Share on Facebook, Instagram, Linkedin and any other social
channel. Ideally put the link in a comment to maximize reach.
Include a link to your Youtube channel on your website, on
business cards, in your email footer, anywhere you can think of.
If you have an email and/or text list, send out a message
announcing your channel and inviting people to subscribe.
TIP: To maximize your subscribers, be sure to use a special “Instant Subscribe
Link”. You’ll find details on how to do this in the last chapter of the 10X
Youtube Manual (10xdownload.com/yt1)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 5 --

RUN ADS TO POPULAR VIDEOS	STEP
6
Realize that much of what you’re doing with your video creation is
experimenting to find out what your viewers want. The goal is to find what most
resonates with your core audience. When you find videos that get a high rate of
likes, comments and subscribes, spend a little money promoting those posts to
your target audience.
You can find more details on running basic ads in the manual
(10xdownload.com/yt1).
Once you’ve reached 100 subscribers, you can choose a custom URL for your
channel! Edit in the customization section to be youtube.com/whateveryouwant
(your old link will still work).
Your next milestone is to become a member of the Youtube Partner Program
and be eligible for monetization. This will allow you to run ads on your videos
and get paid. Just as important, once approved, you ‘ll be able to post links at the
end of your videos. To be granted monetization you must reach 1000 subscribers
and 4000 total hours of organic watch time.
Remember that your first 100 subscribers are by far the hardest. Take it one
video at a time and keep going!
CUSTOMIZE URL AND MONETIZE	STEP
7
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
